attributes.name: Hockey 1
attributes.description: All skaters that need skating aids (e.g. buckets or seals) should register for the Tiny Tot series before beginning Hockey 1. Youth Hockey 1 - 2 - 3 These classes are open to children ages 6 and up and is an introductory class to the fundamentals of hockey skating. A skater should have already completed a skating class: Tiny Tots, PreHockey, Youth Beginner 1, or another comparable class at another rink to join the HOCKEY 1 class. Full gear is required for these classes.
